title: rubus lithophilus
intro: Rubus lithophilus, also known as Lithosuberberry or Mountain Avens, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, offering various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus lithophilus can be made into teas, tinctures, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
